title: Modern Web Development
description: Master HTML, CSS, JavaScript, React and modern web technologies

lessons.title: Complete Web Development Course
lessons.content:
Web development is the process of building websites and web applications. It includes both frontend and backend technologies working together. Frontend focuses on the user interface while backend handles logic and data processing.

HTML is used to structure web pages using elements like headings, paragraphs, and containers. CSS is used to style the website by adding colors, layouts, and responsive designs. JavaScript adds interactivity such as handling user actions and updating content dynamically.

Modern web development also includes tools like Git for version control, GitHub for collaboration, and browser developer tools for debugging.

In real-world applications, web development is used to build portfolio websites, e-commerce platforms, and complex web applications like social media platforms.

By the end of this lesson, you will understand how websites are structured, styled, and made interactive.

title: Data Science Fundamentals
description: Learn Python, Pandas, Data Visualization and ML basics

lessons.title: Data Science Full Course
lessons.content:
Data science is the process of extracting meaningful insights from data. It combines programming, statistics, and domain knowledge.

Python is one of the most popular languages in data science. It is used along with libraries like NumPy for numerical operations and Pandas for data analysis.

Data analysis involves cleaning data, handling missing values, and transforming data into useful formats. Visualization tools like Matplotlib and Seaborn are used to represent data in charts and graphs.

Machine learning is a part of data science that focuses on building models that can learn from data. It includes techniques like classification and regression.

In real-world applications, data science is used in business analytics, recommendation systems, and predictive modeling.

By the end of this lesson, you will understand how to analyze and visualize data effectively.

lessons.title: UI/UX Design Complete Guide
lessons.content:
UI and UX design focus on creating user-friendly digital experiences. UI design deals with visual elements such as colors, typography, and layout. UX design focuses on improving user satisfaction by enhancing usability and accessibility.

Design tools like Figma and Adobe XD are commonly used to create layouts and prototypes.

Good design follows principles such as simplicity, consistency, and clarity. Designers also consider accessibility to ensure applications can be used by everyone.

UI and UX design are widely used in mobile apps, websites, and software products.

By the end of this lesson, you will understand how to design clean and effective user interfaces.

lessons.title: Cyber Security Full Course
lessons.content:
Cybersecurity focuses on protecting systems, networks, and data from digital attacks. It includes identifying threats and implementing measures to prevent them.

Common threats include malware, viruses, phishing, and hacking attempts. Tools like firewalls and antivirus software are used to secure systems.

Cybersecurity is important in areas like banking, online transactions, and personal data protection.

By the end of this lesson, you will understand basic security practices and how to protect systems from threats.

lessons.title: AI & ML Full Course
lessons.content:
Artificial Intelligence enables machines to perform tasks that normally require human intelligence. Machine Learning is a subset of AI that allows systems to learn from data.

Machine learning models are trained using data and algorithms. These models can make predictions or decisions without being explicitly programmed.

Common applications include chatbots, recommendation systems, and self-driving cars.

Popular tools include TensorFlow and Scikit-learn.

By the end of this lesson, you will understand the basics of AI and how machines learn from data.
